segments.text: First listen and then answer the question.

translations.zh-Hans: 先听录音，然后回答问题。

segments.text: Did the boy go where he wanted to?

translations.zh-Hans: 这个男孩到达了自己想去的地方吗？

segments.text: Children who play truant from school are unimaginative.

translations.zh-Hans: 逃学的孩子通常都缺乏想象力。

segments.text: A quiet day's fishing, or eight hours in a cinema seeing the same film over and over again, is usually as far as they get.

translations.zh-Hans: 安安静静地钓一天鱼，或是在电影院里把同一部电影反复看上八小时，通常就是他们所能想到的全部花样。

segments.text: They have all been put to shame by a boy who, while playing truant, traveled 1,600 miles.

translations.zh-Hans: 然而，一个逃学期间旅行了1,600英里的男孩，却让他们全都相形见绌。

segments.text: He hitchhiked to Dover and, towards evening, went into a boat to find somewhere to sleep.

translations.zh-Hans: 他搭便车到了多佛，傍晚时钻进一条船，想找个地方睡觉。

segments.text: When he woke up next morning, he discovered that the boat had, in the meantime, traveled to Calais.

translations.zh-Hans: 第二天早晨醒来时，他发现那条船已经在这段时间里开到了加来。

segments.text: No one noticed the boy as he crept off.

translations.zh-Hans: 男孩悄悄溜下船时，没有人注意到他。

segments.text: From there, he hitchhiked to Paris in a lorry.

translations.zh-Hans: 他从那里搭上一辆卡车，前往巴黎。

segments.text: The driver gave him a few biscuits and a cup of coffee and left him just outside the city.

translations.zh-Hans: 司机给了他几块饼干和一杯咖啡，把他留在了城外不远处。

segments.text: The next car the boy stopped did not take him into the center of Paris, as he hoped it would, but to Perpignan, on the French-Spanish border.

translations.zh-Hans: 男孩拦下的下一辆车并没有如他所愿把他带进巴黎市中心，而是把他带到了法西边境的佩皮尼昂。

segments.text: There he was picked up by a policeman and sent back to England by the local authorities.

translations.zh-Hans: 他在那里被一名警察发现，当地政府随后把他遣送回英国。

segments.text: He has surely set up a record for the thousands of children who dream of evading school.

translations.zh-Hans: 对于成千上万梦想逃学的孩子来说，他无疑创下了一项纪录。
